On 8/31/06, laetitia Simon
<laetitia@thehighway-music.com: <mailto:
laetitia@thehighway-music.com> > wrote: Hello
Cecilia,

Have you heard anything from Jeffrey?? If not could
you check again and
also tell him that i'll defently be coming around
september 15th and if he
cannot rent me a place for the entire three months
maybe he can let me
stay for 20 days or more so have time to look for a
place???
Thank you very much
Take care

Laeitita, i have forwarded it to JE

On 8/25/06, laetitia Simon
<laetitia@thehighway-music.com: <mailto:
laetitia@thehighway-music.com> > wrote:

Note for Jeffrey,

Hello Jeffrey,
Sorry about this summer when you came to Paris i
wasn't there to take

care
of you!!!
I was in NY working on my project.
How are you??? i hope all is well, i'm back in
Paris and i should be

here
until mid september!
I needed to ask you something i'm working on an
album project that's

gonna
happen in NY in the next 3 to 4 months they want
to send me there so i

can
organise the entire album.
I will of course need a place to stay from
September 13 til december 13,

i
have a small budget to rent a place and i was
wondering if you'll let me

stay in one of your apartment for 1000$ per month
til december????

I know this is probably not the price those
apartment will cost but

that's
all i can afford!!!So could you please let me
know if it is possible?

This is a really good business opportunity if i
realize this album it's

gonna change everything in my carreer!!
I hope i'll hear from you soon
Take care
PS: and while i'm in NY i'll be looking for
massage people for as

well!!!

Laetitia Simon
International
THE HIGHWAY MUSIC
40 rue Berthe
75018 Paris

www.thehighway-music.com:
http://www.thehighway-music.com

Europe ++33 661 100 404
USA 1 917 216 5348
